scripts.check:data: node scripts/normalize-images.js --check && node scripts/build-data.js --check && node scripts/verify-teachables.js && node scripts/verify-perk-descriptions.js
scripts.verify:content: node scripts/normalize-images.js --check && node scripts/verify-teachables.js && node scripts/verify-perk-descriptions.js
scripts.android:build: npm run sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
